summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Vision-Based Smart Classroom Environment Monitoring System. Backend APIs (100% success), frontend functionality, and AI image analysis integration all working correctly. System successfully analyzes classroom images for occupancy, cleanliness, and lighting using OpenAI Vision GPT-4o.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console about <tr> elements wrapped in <span>
design_issues.impact: Non-critical - UI functions correctly but shows console warnings

passed_tests: All 3 API endpoints responding correctly (GET /api/, GET /api/stats, GET /api/analyses, POST /api/analyze)
Image analysis functionality with OpenAI Vision working perfectly
Dashboard page loads and displays stats correctly
Dashboard shows recent analyses table with real-time updates
Analyze page image upload and analysis workflow complete
Analysis results display with proper occupancy count, cleanliness score, lighting condition, and observations
Status badges display correct colors based on data values
History page shows all analyses in tabular format
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Analyze, History) working
Image format validation (JPEG, PNG, WEBP) working
Data persistence to MongoDB and retrieval working
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
